error[E0277]: the type `[i32]` cannot be indexed by `std::ops::RangeFrom<i32>`

   |
32 |         let mut q = &mut buf[off..];
   |                              ^^^^^ slice indices are of type `usize` or ranges of `usize`
   |
   = help: the trait `SliceIndex<[i32]>` is not implemented for `std::ops::RangeFrom<i32>`
   = help: the following other types implement trait `SliceIndex<T>`:
             `std::ops::RangeFrom<usize>` implements `SliceIndex<ByteStr>`

             `std::ops::RangeFrom<usize>` implements `SliceIndex<str>`
   = note: required for `[i32]` to implement `Index<std::ops::RangeFrom<i32>>`
   = note: 1 redundant requirement hidden
   = note: required for `[i32; 20]` to implement `Index<std::ops::RangeFrom<i32>>`
